title: Yijing Hexagram 11: Tai (Peace)
description: Hexagram 11 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 11 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The small departs, the great approaches. Good fortune. Success. Heaven and earth unite.
